{{Quote|Conduct the negotiations.|Admiral Ackbar to Commander Sirlul, regarding ''Monarch''{{'s}} surrender|<ref name="WG" />}}
The '''''Monarch''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]], commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Averen]] and serving under [[Director of Imperial Intelligence|Director]] of [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] [[Ysanne Isard]]. It was one of two ships left to defend [[Coruscant/Legends|Imperial Center]] against the impending [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] invasion. It surrendered and was eventually added to the New Republic fleet.

==History==
The ''Monarch''{{'s}} class was never specified, but well before the battle, [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] stated that approximately seven [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class star destroyers]] were on station defending [[Coruscant/Legends|Imperial Center]]. It was also stated that both sides' Star Destroyers traded missiles during the battle, something Imperial-class Star Destroyers did not have, lending more credibility to the ship being a Victory-class Star Destroyer.<ref name="WG" />

===Reputation===
Although tasked with the defense of Imperial Center, the ''Monarch'' was not known for its illustrious reputation or crew. As a result, Isard chose it to defend the planet during the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|Seizure of Coruscant]] along with the Star Destroyer [[Triumph (Victory-class)|''Triumph'']], which had a similarly unimpressive reputation.<ref name="WG" />

Isard wanted Coruscant to fall to the Rebel hands so that the New Republic would find its [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] resources devastated by an outbreak of the [[krytos virus]]. Therefore, it is likely Isard knew the ''Monarch'' and ''Triumph'' would be either captured or destroyed during the battle. She essentially left them for dead, choosing to instead relocate the superior Star Destroyers [[Emperor's Will (Victory-class)|''Emperor's Will'']] and [[Imperator (Victory-class)|''Imperator'']].<ref name="WG" />

===Capture during Coruscant battle===
During the battle, the ''Monarch'' took heavy fire by the New Republic's Star Destroyers ''[[Emancipator]]'' and [[Liberator (Imperial I-class)|''Liberator'']], and [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Cruiser]] [[Home One/Legends|''Home One'']]. Although the ''Triumph'' sustained more damage, the assaults were nevertheless enough to destroy the ''Monarch''{{'s}} shields.<ref name="WG" />

Shortly following the power loss and capture of the ''Triumph'', Captain Averen surrendered to the ''Home One''. Admiral Ackbar accepted and [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Sirlul]] negotiated the terms of the surrender, which were either unconditional or had insignificant conditions.<ref name="WG" />

Following the battle and surrender, the ''Monarch'' was added to the New Republic fleet.
